sourceMovie.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1 works as a science fiction movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The science fiction and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Hunger Games
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1 clicked for you, The Hunger Games (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1?
faq.answer: Try The Hunger Games, Maze Runner: The Scorch Trials, The Hunger Games: Catching Fire—each shares DNA with The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1?
faq.answer: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1 (2014) is best described as Science Fiction, Adventure, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "The Hunger Games Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
